message:
🐛 Fix analytics proxy blocked by JWT auth middleware (#1296)

Move the /api/m analytics proxy route registration before the
/api group that applies JWTAuth middleware. The analytics endpoint
must be public (no auth) because the browser's custom tracker
fires events before/without user authentication. The endpoint
has its own origin validation for security.

This fixes 401 Unauthorized errors on localhost analytics requests.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
